title: TTS Multi-Engine Worker
description: Text-to-speech with Kokoro (54 voices, 9 languages), Dia (multi-speaker dialogue), and F5-TTS (zero-shot voice cloning). OpenAI-compatible API.

env.label: TTS Engine
env.description: Which TTS engine to load: kokoro, dia, or f5

presets.name: Kokoro — Fast Multi-Voice TTS
presets.description: 82M param model. 54 voices across 9 languages. 36-96x realtime on GPU. Apache 2.0 license.

presets.name: Dia — Dialogue & Non-Verbal TTS
presets.description: 1.6B param model by Nari Labs. Multi-speaker dialogue with [S1]/[S2] tags. Supports laughs, sighs, and other non-verbal sounds.

presets.name: F5-TTS — Zero-Shot Voice Cloning
presets.description: 300M param diffusion model. Clone any voice from a 5-15 second audio sample. Supports English and Chinese.
